parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Resend Email destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise resend:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Resend emails payload delivered straight to api.resend.com.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Resend destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Resend emails API (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Resend Email apikey

from_addr_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Resend Email from addr
